utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Now , this is last minute so I want to apologize for the mess . Okay ?

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Oh my God ! It sure did not look this way when I lived here .

emotion_cause.span: 2_It sure did not look this way when I lived here .
2_Oh my God ! It sure did not look this way when I lived here .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Now look , there is only one problem though .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: There is only room for one , so I guess one of you will have to stay at Joey .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Well , since the fire was kinda my fault I guess you should get to stay here .

emotion_cause.span: 6_since the fire was kinda my fault I guess you should get to stay here .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Hey ! Hey ... hey , now this was no one fault Pheebs . Okay ? It was an accident .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Well no , it was my fault so you should get the nice room .

emotion_cause.span: 8_it was my fault so you should get the nice room .
11_You are the first guest at Hotel Monica !

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: You are the first guest at Hotel Monica !

emotion_cause.span: 11_You are the first guest at Hotel Monica !

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Umm , you will just have to tell me how you like your eggs in the morning .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: And I thought I would bring them to you , you know , in bed .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Oh , you have been through so much .
